purpose: Machine-readable source of truth for which repo surfaces produce launch-readiness evidence.

launch_owned.role: Backend of record for web generate/remix, SSE, validation, evals, runtime debug, and launch checks.
Frontend of record for the Remix Studio web app.

deployment_handoff.role: Render Blueprint handoff for the launch Hub API and managed Redis/Postgres resources.

legacy_explicit_only.role: Legacy backend and eval harness retained for explicit parity checks.
Legacy frontend retained for explicit parity checks.

rules: Launch reports and release status must name the launch-owned surface that produced the evidence.
Legacy backend/frontend evidence must be labeled legacy parity evidence and cannot satisfy launch readiness.
Primary Makefile test/build/launch gates must not depend on legacy targets.
